zh.Havering, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可哈維林 利波迪
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Montfitchet III是Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet的兒子，於1225年出生在英國英格蘭艾可哈維林 利波迪。他至少有1個兒子。他於1242年在英國英格蘭艾可被列為sheriff of essex。他去世於1258年享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Montfitchet III was born in 1225, in Havering Liberty, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet. He had at least 1 son. In 1242, at the age of 17, his occupation is listed as sheriff of essex in Essex, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1258, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Montfitchet III est né en 1225, à Havering Liberty, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. En 1242, à l’âge de 17 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of essex à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1258, à l’âge de 33 ans.

Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. 1242, als er 17 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of essex in Essex, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1258 im Alter von 33 Jahren.

ja.Essex, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスエセックス
ja.Havering, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスヘイバーイング リバートイ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Montfitchet IIIは1225年にイギリスイギリスエセックスヘイバーイング リバートイでRichard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchetの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。1242年，17歳の時，イギリスイギリスエセックスでの職業はsheriff of essexと記録されている。彼は1258年に33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Montfitchet III(은)는 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 하버링 리버티에서 Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1242년, 17세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 sheriff of essex이었다. 그는 1258년 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Montfitchet III родился в 1225 г. в местности хавиринг либирти, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1242 году, в возрасте 17 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of essex в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1258 г. в возрасте 33 лет.
